name: Apple Sausage Breakfast Ring
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/2 cups Crushed butter crackers (Ritz or HiHo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl, mixing well.
2. Press the mixture into a ring mold lined with wax paper or plastic wrap.
3. Chill overnight.
4. Unmold and place onto a baking sheet with raised edges.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
Suggestion: Fill the center ring with scrambled eggs before serving.
A breakfast favorite for holidays.
